title: ctenitis lepigera
intro: Ctenitis lepigera, also known as the lepigera fern or the lesser shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its extracts exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ctenitis lepigera include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Ctenitis lepigera is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves can also be used fresh in salads or as a garnish, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
